caption: The video displays a screen capture of a web page for "tradesanta," featuring a dashboard under the section "Analytics > table." The interface includes a bar graph titled "Graph" with a time-scale x-axis and a y-axis ranging from 0.0 to 2.5. To the right, a "Calculated profit" box displays the value "$ 27.8818" highlighted in green. Below this is a "Trade Analysis" section listing "Volume Aggregated volume" with values "0.09969464 BTC" and "6.5677214 ETH." At the bottom, a "List of results (340)" indicates it is "Showing 1–100 of 340 items." Throughout the sequence, the layout remains static, but the bars on the graph fluctuate slightly, indicating real-time data updates. The overall color scheme is minimalist, with a white background, light gray borders, and blue bars for the data visualization.
